6272 N Spring Ct, Leesburg, IN 46538, USA

Many Staghorn sumacs(Red Sumac) at the corner of N. Teeple and E. Stanton. These are the non-poisonous sumacs and the red berry cones can be used to make a lemonade-type drink by steeping them. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
